plan.title: High-volume mechanical Sonar smells
plan.reason: These rules clear many issues with low behavior risk when tested per touched surface.
actions: S6759: convert React props to Readonly props by component cluster.
S3358/S7735: replace nested or negated conditions with named statements.
S7764: use globalThis/globalThis.window in browser guards.
S7781/S6582: use replaceAll and optional chaining where behavior is identical.

plan.reason: Large files need behavior tests before extraction.
actions: Start with operations-realtime-patching buildComandaFromPayload mapping extraction.
Then staff/owner mobile shells after mobile coverage is active.
Leave ComandaService for a dedicated contract-protected pass.

plan.title: ESLint warning budget

actions: Reduce by cluster and update this report after each cleanup.
Do not enable fail-on-alert until the baseline is intentionally accepted.
